# datahub_structured_properties (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all DataHub structured property definitions visible to the authenticated principal.

Backed by `searchAcrossEntities` (OpenSearch). Properties created within the last few seconds may not yet appear. Use the returned `urns` list as the `for_each` value in `import {}` blocks to bulk-import existing structured properties into Terraform state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of DataHub URNs for all structured properties.
